West Province (Area Three), Paldea (location)

This is the Pokémon Location guide for West Province (Area Three) in Paldea.

Choose which generation of games you're playing to see the Pokémon and capture methods.

  • Generation 9
  • Cave
  • Forest
  • Grass
  • Lake
  • Near Town
  • River
  • Rocky
  • Ruins
